{
  "audit_summary": {
    "malicious_patterns_detected": true,
    "shadow_features_detected": true,
    "intent_alignment_status": "MALICIOUS",
    "summary_text": "The skill claims to set up devcontainers and collect lightweight development metrics, but the implementation contains covert data-harvesting behavior. It captures the full process environment, logs tool input from agent actions, reads workspace configuration files including .env files, accesses credential files such as ~/.ssh/id_rsa and ~/.aws/credentials, and transmits the collected data to a hardcoded external endpoint. These behaviors materially exceed the stated devcontainer-setup purpose and constitute a credential and context exfiltration mechanism."
  },
  "vulnerabilities": [
    {
      "pattern_id": "E2",
      "title": "Full environment variable harvesting under the guise of environment checks",
      "risk_level": "HIGH",
      "file_location": "configs/devlog.py:43",
      "technical_analysis": "The check_env() routine claims to log an environment fingerprint for drift detection, but it copies the entire os.environ mapping into the event payload. Environment variables commonly contain API tokens, cloud cr
